metadata.description: Ambiguous/human-style questions for NLQ robustness testing

ambiguity_types.incomplete: Missing key information (metric, period, or both)
ambiguity_types.vague_metric: Unclear which specific metric is requested
ambiguity_types.broad_request: Asking for multiple data points at once
ambiguity_types.burn_rate: Burn rate question - applies but not reported discretely for profitable companies

questions.question: rev?
questions.notes: Single word query - must infer they want current/this year

questions.question: how'd we do last year
questions.notes: No specific metric requested - provide key financials

questions.question: whats the margin
questions.interpretation: Which margin? Provide all three for current year
questions.notes: Margin could mean gross, operating, or net

questions.question: q4 numbers
questions.notes: No year specified - assume most recent completed Q4

questions.question: are we profitable
questions.notes: Requires yes/no answer with context

questions.question: hows the top line looking
questions.notes: Casual phrasing, wants current state + trend

questions.question: give me the P&L
questions.ground_truth: 2026: Revenue $200M, COGS $70M, Gross Profit $130M, SG&A $60M, Operating Profit $70M, Net Income $45M
questions.interpretation: Full P&L summary for current year
questions.notes: Wants full income statement, not single metric

questions.question: did we hit 150
questions.notes: Must infer 150 = revenue target in millions

questions.question: costs too high?
questions.ground_truth: COGS 35% of revenue, SG&A 30% - consistent with targets
questions.notes: Requires interpretation of 'too high'

questions.question: cash position
questions.notes: Two words, no verb, no timeframe

questions.question: year over year
questions.notes: No metric specified - assume revenue growth

questions.question: what about Q2
questions.interpretation: Next Q2 (2026) since we're in Q1 2026
questions.notes: Which Q2? Depends on current date context

questions.question: bookings vs revenue
questions.ground_truth: Bookings 115% of revenue (e.g., 2025: $172.5M bookings vs $150M revenue)
questions.notes: Wants relationship between metrics, not raw numbers

questions.question: where are we on AR
questions.ground_truth: $20.71M as of Q4 2025, ~45 days sales outstanding
questions.notes: Casual phrasing for accounts receivable status

questions.question: quick ratio stuff
questions.notes: Wants liquidity info but imprecise request

questions.question: 2025 in a nutshell
questions.ground_truth: Revenue $150M (+50% YoY), Net Income $28.13M (18.8% margin), Operating Margin 35%
questions.notes: Wants condensed annual overview

questions.question: burn rate?
questions.ground_truth: Our COGS of $70M and SG&A of $60M total $130M annually. We are quite profitable, however, and have been for a long time, therefore we do not report burn_rate discretely.
questions.interpretation: Cash burn assessment - acknowledge costs but explain profitable companies don't report discretely
questions.notes: Burn rate applies to profitable companies for tracking expansion/efficiency, but not reported discretely

questions.question: opex breakdown pls
questions.interpretation: Operating expense detail for current year
questions.notes: Casual with abbreviation

questions.question: we growing?
questions.notes: Yes/no question needing supporting evidence

questions.question: compare this year to last
questions.ground_truth: 2026 vs 2025: Revenue $200M vs $150M (+33%), Net Income $45M vs $28.13M (+60%), Operating Margin 35% vs 35% (flat)
questions.notes: No specific metrics - provide comprehensive comparison
